checks.name: css_palette_compliance
checks.evidence: All 4 CSS files use only hex colors from the 12-color palette. Verified via Python regex: 12 unique hex colors, all match palette.

checks.name: css_no_warm_colors
checks.evidence: grep -rni for warm color keywords (orange, yellow, pink, #FF0, #F00) returned 0 matches after excluding #8B0000 (taillight-red, allowed). CSS variable --color-dark-brown uses correct name.

checks.name: css_no_border_radius
checks.evidence: grep -rn 'border-radius' across 4 CSS files returned 0 matches. Sharp/rectangular styling consistent with Y2K aesthetic.

checks.name: html_no_framework_import
checks.evidence: No React, Vue, Angular, jQuery, or Bootstrap imports in index.html. Only three.js CDN + Google Fonts.

checks.name: html_no_emoji
checks.evidence: Python Unicode emoji range scan on index.html returned 0 matches.

checks.name: js_no_import_statement
checks.evidence: 0 import/require() statements across all 8 JS files. Vanilla script-loading pattern used.

checks.name: js_no_framework_ref
checks.evidence: 0 framework references in any JavaScript file. Pure vanilla JS.

checks.name: backend_api_schema
checks.evidence: POST /api/game/action returns all 5 required fields: narrative, emotion_value, infection_level, scene_trigger, viewer_count.

checks.name: backend_pytest
checks.evidence: pytest backend/test_server.py: 29 passed, 0 failed, 0 errors. All test suites green (TestNewGame, TestGameAction, TestGameState, TestWebSocket).

checks.name: frontend_file_structure
checks.evidence: All 15 required files present: 1 HTML, 4 CSS, 4 JS, 4 scene modules, 2 GLSL shaders.

checks.name: crt_opacity_check
checks.evidence: CRT overlay opacity = 0.4 (frontend/css/crt.css:12), within required range [0.35, 0.45].

checks.name: ps1_shader_wobble
checks.evidence: Vertex wobble at ps1_vertex.glsl:14: float wobble = sin(mvPosition.y * 100.0 + uTime) * 0.3; applied to mvPosition.x.

summary: QA Integration Report: 12/12 checks PASSED. All quality gates green. CSS palette compliant, no warm colors, no border-radius, no framework imports, no emoji, no JS import/require, no JS framework refs, API schema valid, pytest 29/29 passed, file structure complete, CRT opacity 0.4, PS1 vertex wobble implemented.
